profile.name: 鍾貽丞
profile.school: 國立政治大學 資訊管理學系
profile.intro: 前端工程師做了三年多，去年決定給自己一個新方向，考上了心理諮商研究所，準備朝心理師的路走。這個網站留著，記錄一下工程師時期學到的東西怎麼帶到下一階段。

profile.name: Yi-Cheng, Chung
profile.intro: I spent three years as a front-end engineer before deciding on a new direction last year — I was admitted to a counseling psychology graduate program and am now working toward becoming a therapist. This site stays up as a record of carrying what I learned as an engineer into the next chapter.
